response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, Texas, reported quarterly revenues of $12.3 million in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3 and $16.2 million in Q4, for a total of $54.4 million in the year. This performance represents an 18% year-over-year growth, and the company supports its operations with a team of 342 employees.
